instruction: Given $\csc(\alpha)=-2\sqrt 3/3$ and $3\pi/2<\alpha<2\pi$, find the exact values of the remaining five trigonometric functions. Note: You are not allowed to use decimals in your answer. $\sin(\alpha)$=[ANS]. $\cos(\alpha)$=[ANS]. $\tan(\alpha)$=[ANS]. $\sec(\alpha)$=[ANS]. $\cot(\alpha)$=[ANS].
